action.reasoning: Observation: Current best ic_mean 0.057898 from two-model LightGBM ensemble (DART+GBDT). Weighted averaging of all models reduced ic_mean to 0.057079, indicating weak models dilute performance. Analysis: Adding a third strong, diverse LightGBM model (e.g., DART with different hyperparameters) and combining equally may push test IC slightly higher. Remaining time 0.97h allows one new model training (~25 min). Decision: Train a new LightGBM DART model with extreme regularization on Alpha158 (same features) to create a diverse ensemble, save as lgb_model_2.txt. Update predict.py to average predictions from all lgb_model_*.txt in checkpoint directory. Submit eval to measure improvement.
